episodes.title: Memphis based nonprofit leader tied up on Epstein Island
episodes.description: The leader of a Memphis-based nonprofit is now speaking out after being found tied up on an island associated with Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Justice Department reviewing Epstein files release
episodes.description: The Department of Justice's watchdog will investigate how the department handled the release of the heavily redacted Epstein files.
